metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2617
metadata.comment:
Rationale: 19/2/2018 Pim
- Overexpression (Fig.2) and KD (Fig.3) of SLITRK4 changes the number of Glut (not GABA) synapses.. Experimental description: Methods
Artificial synapse-formation assays, cell-adhesion assays, and cell surface labeling assays were performed with HEK293T cells as previously described (22, 30). (ref.) Primary rat hippocampal neurons were cultured from E18 embryos.

Overexpressed proteins:
- "pCDNA1-Slitrk3 encodes full-length mouse Slitrk3"
- "pGW1-Slitrk3 encodes full-length human Slitrk3"
- "pCMV5-Slitrk4 encodes full-length human Slitrk4"
- "pCMV5-Slitrk5 encodes full-length Slitrk5" (species not mentioned)
- "pCMV5-Slitrk1-monomeric Venus (mVenus) encodes full-length human Slitrk1"
- "pCMV5-Slitrk2-mVenus encodes full-length human Slitrk2"
- human PTP-δ-Ecto (NM_002839, aa 21-1174) (traced back to PMID:20139422)
- human PTP-σ-Ecto (NM_130854, aa 30-1167) (traced back to PMID:20139422)

- Selected human species based on overexpressed protein.
